scripts.typecheck: npm run build:config && npm run build:cloud && npm run build:utils && npm run build:policy && npm run build:sdk && npm run build:harness-driver && npm run build:harnesses && cd packages/cli && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:rust && npm run build:core
scripts.build:core: npm run build:config && npm run build:cloud && npm run build:utils && npm run build:policy && npm run build:sdk && npm run build:harness-driver && npm run build:harnesses && npm run build:cli
scripts.build:packages:watch: echo 'Package watch build was removed with the simplified core surface. Use package-specific watch commands instead.'
scripts.watch:start: npm run build && concurrently -k "npm run dev:watch" "node --watch packages/cli/dist/cli/index.js start dashboard.js claude"
scripts.predev: npm run clean && npm run build:packages && cd packages/cli && npx tsc && cd ../.. && chmod +x packages/cli/dist/cli/index.js
scripts.dev:local: npm run build && (cd packages/cli && npm link) && echo '✓ agent-relay linked globally'
scripts.dev:unlink: (cd packages/cli && npm unlink -g agent-relay) && echo '✓ agent-relay unlinked'
scripts.dev:rebuild: npm run build && echo '✓ Rebuilt (linked version updated)'
scripts.build:rust: if command -v ~/.cargo/bin/cargo >/dev/null 2>&1; then ~/.cargo/bin/cargo build --release --bin agent-relay-broker && echo '✓ broker binary (agent-relay-broker) built at target/release/agent-relay-broker'; else echo '⚠ Rust not installed, skipping local broker build; installs use platform optional dependencies'; fi
scripts.test:integration:broker: npx tsc -p tests/integration/broker/tsconfig.json && cd tests/integration/broker && node --test dist/*.test.js
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/cli/dist && find packages -maxdepth 2 -name dist -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
